observations.summary: The motif of a single point of light in darkness in the father's dream parallels Dan's recurring vision of stars as guiding lights in the cosmic dark, symbolizing hope and clarity amid despair.

source_evidence.quote: He thought of the star he'd placed in his father's dream—that single point of light in the gray.

observations.target_hint: Dan's dreams and visions of stars as guiding lights in the cosmic dark, representing hope and clarity.
